news.headline: Reports indicate Tesla holds $780M in Bitcoin despite recent movement, data shows assets remain company's.
news.summary: The significant Bitcoin transfers made by Tesla initially raised concerns of a potential market sell-off. However, data from Arkham indicates that the firm still maintains control over the assets, calming these worries.

FrontView REIT, Inc. exercised underwriters' option for 1,090,846 shares, raising gross proceeds to $271.5M.
news.summary: In Dallas on October 22, 2024, FrontView REIT, Inc. disclosed that the underwriters for its initial public offering have decided to buy an extra 1,090,846 shares of the company's common stock (NYSE: FVR). This move comes after the underwriters' initial announcement, increasing their total share purchase.

Grupo Elektra reports 42% growth in EBITDA to Ps.6,865M in Q3 2024, with a 13% rise in revenue to Ps. 50,761M. Banco Azteca Mexico's net credit portfolio up 13% to Ps.183,525M.
news.summary: The financial and commercial sectors experienced significant growth, leading to a 13% rise in consolidated revenue totaling Ps. 50,761 million. Banco Azteca México saw a strong performance with a 13% increase in its net credit portfolio, amounting to Ps. 183,525 million. The asset strength of Banco Azteca México is also on the rise.

Stability AI bounces back with Stable Diffusion 3.5, featuring new models and enhanced capabilities after the setback of Stable Diffusion 3 Medium.
news.summary: Stability AI, following a setback with Stable Diffusion 3 Medium, has rebounded with the release of Stable Diffusion 3.5. This latest version provides customizable models that are uncensored, rapid, and readily available to all users.

Cequence Security partners with IISI to provide API protection in Taiwan with Unified API Protection platform.
news.summary: In Sunnyvale, California, Cequence, a trailblazer in API security and bot management, has revealed a fresh collaboration with International Integrated Systems, Inc. (IISI), a notable provider of information security and communication technologies. This partnership will see IISI and Cequence teaming up to offer the cutting-edge Unified API Protection (UAP) platform and additional services to clients in Taiwan. APIs serve as the foundation of contemporary digital networks, facilitating numerous transactions. This latest venture aims to enhance cybersecurity measures in the region, providing advanced protection to clients.

Tupperware Brands Corp to form New Tupperware Co, sold to lender group, closing by end of October 2024.
news.summary: A consortium of lenders is set to acquire the renowned brand Tupperware Brands Corporation, known for its consumer products, with the transaction expected to be finalized by the end of October. The company, listed as TUPBQ on the OTC Pink market, is recognized globally for its iconic status in the industry.

A total of 49 individuals have fallen ill, with 10 requiring hospitalization, following consumption at McDonald's outlets across 10 states. Additionally, one person...

news.headline: Volaris reports Q3 2024 financial results: EBITDAR of USD $315M, net income of $37M, TRASM at $9.38 cents, ASMs decrease by 14%.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Volaris reported net income of $37 million with earnings per American Depositary Shares (ADS) of $0.32. Total operating revenues were $813 million, a 4% decrease, while total revenue per available seat mile (TRASM) increased by 12% to $9.38 cents. Available seat miles (ASMs) decreased by 14% to 8.7 billion. Total operating expenses were $687 million, with total operating expenses per available seat mile (CASM) remaining flat at $7.92 cents. EBITDAR was $315 million, a 52% increase with an EBITDAR margin of 38.7%. The company's total cash and short-term investments were $830 million. The net debt-to-LTM EBITDAR ratio decreased to 2.7x. Volaris added one A320neo aircraft during the quarter, bringing the total fleet to 137. The company expected ASM growth of around -7% for the fourth quarter of 2024 and EBITDAR margin of around 39%. Volaris' financial debt amounted to $740 million, and net debt-to-LTM EBITDAR ratio stood at 2.7x. This summary provides the financial highlights and operational performance of Volaris in Q3 2024.

news.headline: MiniTool launched NewsPivot, a tech content platform, aiming to provide insights and trends for users.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 22, 2024, MiniTool Software introduced NewsPivot, a new website aimed at providing informative content on a range of technology subjects. NewsPivot is tailored to offer users valuable insights into the latest technological trends and updates. This platform serves as a comprehensive resource, delivering essential information to its audience.

news.headline: High Roller Technologies priced IPO at $8/share, offering 1.25M shares for $10M gross proceeds. Underwriters have option for additional 187.5K shares.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, Nevada, on October 22, 2024, High Roller Technologies, Inc. revealed the pricing of its initial public offering on the NYSE American as "ROLR." The Company, distinguished for its www.HighRoller.com and www.Fruta.com platforms catering to high rollers in online gaming, issued 1,250,000 shares of common stock at $8.00 per share. This move amassed a total of $10 million in gross proceeds, excluding expenses and underwriting discounts. Moreover, High Roller granted the underwriters a 45-day option to obtain up to 187,500 additional shares to cover any over-allotments.

news.headline: GM exceeded estimates and joined IBD 50; new stocks added to various top-rated lists. Check out for details. (Characters: 96)
news.summary: A collection of the highest-ranked growth stocks, including GM, recently made it onto prestigious lists such as the IBD 50, IBD Big Cap 20, Sector Leaders, Stock Spotlight, and IPO Leaders. GM surpassed expectations and secured its spot on the IBD 50 list. Curious readers can explore the new additions on the Big Cap 20, Stock Spotlight, and other notable listings.

news.headline: ShiftPixy, Inc. announced signing LOI to acquire TurboScale, clarifying prior statements from Oct. 17, 2024.
news.summary: In a recent development, ShiftPixy, Inc. (Nasdaq: PIXY), a Florida national staffing enterprise facilitating employment in the Gig Economy, issued a press release to clarify statements from October 17, 2024. On October 16, 2024, the company entered a non-binding Letter of Intent to acquire Turbo. This move reinforces ShiftPixy's commitment to innovation and growth in the industry.

news.headline: Synergy CHC Corp. prices $10.35M IPO with 1,150,000 shares at $9 each, aiming to begin trading on Nasdaq under "SNYR."
news.summary: Synergy CHC Corp., a company specializing in consumer health care, beauty, and lifestyle products, revealed the pricing details of its initial public offering on Oct. 22, 2024. The offering consists of 1,150,000 shares of common stock priced at $9.00 per share. Trading of these shares is set to commence on the Nasdaq Global Market on Oct. 23, 2024, using the ticker symbol “SNYR.” Additionally, Synergy has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to acquire up to 172,500 more shares of common stock at the initial offering price, excluding underwriting discounts and commissions. The offering is anticipated to be finalized on Oct. 24, 2024, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions.

news.headline: JPMorgan previews Mattel (NASDAQ:MAT) and Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) earnings ahead of holidays, notes consumer softness.
news.summary: Ahead of their upcoming quarterly earnings reports, JPMorgan provided a preview for Mattel, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAT) and Hasbro, Inc. (NASDAQ: HAS). Analyst Christopher Horvers noted Mattel's successful expansion of shelf space in major retail outlets during the 65th anniversary of Barbie, along with the launch of Mini Barbie Land and Barbie Dreamworld. However, Horvers cautioned that consumer spending remains cautious and selective. The analyst highlighted potential challenges for Mattel due to a shorter holiday season and the upcoming presidential election. JPMorgan maintains a Neutral rating on Mattel.

news.headline: Mount Logan Capital Inc. (CBOE: MLC) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, conference call on Nov 12 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Recordings available on their website.
news.summary: Toronto, October 22, 2024 - Mount Logan Capital Inc. (CBOE: MLC) is set to unveil its financial results for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, subsequent to the market closure on Thursday, November 7, 2024. A conference call has been scheduled for Tuesday, November 12, 2024, at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time to delve into these outcomes. Interested parties including shareholders, potential shareholders, and analysts are encouraged to tune in to the conference call. Access to the call can be obtained using the provided dial-in details. A recording of the conference call will also be accessible on Mount Logan's website www.mountlogancapital.ca within the Investor Relations segment under "Events."

news.headline: Ashley Lourenco from Science Park High School wins national debate tournament, first in school's history. Best speaker award.
news.summary: A senior at Science Park High School in Newark, New Jersey, made history by becoming the first student to receive the top honor at a recent tournament. Ashley Lourenco not only won the tournament's best speaker award but also received a warm applause from her peers when she entered the debate class on Monday. The achievement took place on October 22, 2024, marking a significant moment for the school and showcasing Lourenco's exceptional debate skills.

news.headline: Christopher Chandler wins defamation case, awarded $8,000,001 damages by jury after false statements by Investigative Consultants Inc.
news.summary: In Washington on October 22, 2024, a federal jury ruled in favor of Christopher Chandler, determining that Donald Berlin and Investigative Consultants Inc. had disseminated false and defamatory information about him in a dossier. The jury awarded Chandler $8,000,001 in damages.

news.headline: LEEF Brands partners with Investment Publishing LLC for investor relations. Oct. 22, 2024, in Vancouver. (CSE: LEEF) (OTC: LEEEF).
news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC, 22nd October 2024 - LEEF Brands Inc. (CSE: LEEF) (OTC: LEEEF) has revealed a new collaboration with Investment Publishing LLC to strengthen its investor relations approach. Investment Publishing, spearheaded by Mariusz Skonieczny, will work alongside LEEF to bolster its communication and engagement with investors.

news.headline: MultiMetaVerse Holdings Limited faces Nasdaq delisting due to non-compliance with $1 bid price and $35M market value rules as of October 14, 2024. The company has until October 22 to request a hearing before Nasdaq panel to avoid potential suspension of trading and delisting. If not, securities may trade OTC after being removed from Nasdaq listing.
news.summary: MultiMetaVerse Holdings Limited received a letter from Nasdaq stating it was not compliant with the minimum bid price of $1.00 per share and the minimum market value of listed securities of $35 million requirements under Nasdaq Listing Rules. The Company had until October 14, 2024 to regain compliance but failed to do so. They now have until October 22, 2024 to request a hearing before the Nasdaq Hearings Panel, after which trading in its Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be suspended if no action is taken. If delisted, the securities are expected to trade over-the-counter.

news.headline: PIMCO Canada reveals special meeting details for mergers of closed-end funds PTI, PTO, and PIX into PMEI.
news.summary: PIMCO Canada Corp. has disclosed additional information about the proposed mergers of PIMCO Tactical Income Fund (PTI), PIMCO Tactical Income Opportunities Fund (PTO), and PIMCO Multi-Sector Income Fund (PIX) into the new closed-end fund managed by PIMCO Canada, PIMCO Monthly Enhanced Income Fund (PMEI). The merging of these Existing Funds into PMEI aims to streamline operations and enhance management efficiency. Investors in these funds will be provided with detailed information regarding the transition process as the mergers progress.

news.headline: Celularity Inc. received a delisting notice from Nasdaq due to delayed filings of Forms 10-Q, but plans to appeal.
news.summary: Celularity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELU), a regenerative medicine company focused on placental-derived technologies, has received a notice from Nasdaq on October 16, 2024. The notice states that the company faces delisting for not filing its Forms 10-Q for the periods ending March 31, 2024, and June 30, 2024, within the required 180-day timeframe. Despite this, Celularity's common stock and warrants, traded as "CELU" and "CELUW" on the Nasdaq Capital Market, continue to be listed without immediate impact. This indicates a potential challenge for Celularity in meeting Nasdaq's listing requirements.

Yum! Brands to release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 5, 2024, with conference call at 7am ET. Call numbers: 833/470-1428 (US), 833/950-0062 (Canada), +1/929-526-1599 (Intl), conference ID 611638. Webcast available on Yum! Brands website.
news.summary: Yum! Brands, Inc. will announce its third quarter financial results on Tuesday, November 5, 2024, at 7:00 a.m. Eastern Time. A conference call to discuss the company's financial performance and strategies will follow at 7:45 a.m. Eastern Time. For U.S. callers, the dial-in number is 833-470-1428, for Canada callers it is 833-950-0062, and for all other international callers, the number is +1-929-526-1599. The conference ID is 611638. The event will be webcast live on the Yum! Brands website.

news.headline: Investors in Flux Power Holdings (NASDAQ: FLUX) encouraged to contact RLF about ongoing investigation for possible violations.

(NASDAQ: FLUX) regarding possible breaches of federal securities regulations. Investors who bought Flux Power securities are advised to pay attention as they might be eligible for certain entitlements related to this matter.

news.headline: Investors who suffered losses with Visa Inc. urged to contact RLF for investigation into potential securities violations (NYSE: V).
news.summary: A prominent securities law firm, Rosen Law Firm, based in New York, has disclosed an ongoing inquiry into Visa Inc. (NYSE: V) for potential breaches of federal securities regulations. Those who bought Visa securities are advised that they might qualify for compensation without incurring any initial costs.
